allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://pcpriceUser:!asd123456@localhost:5432/pcpricetrack" -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE image_url IS NOT NULL\) as has_image FROM products;")

Bash(/Library/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql "postgresql://pcpriceUser:!asd123456@localhost:5432/pcpricetrack" -c "SELECT p.name, p.brand, p.slug, p.image_url, c.slug as cat_slug FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.image_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.slug, p.name;")
